Localization.Description: Aggregation of events with id "PT_Checkpoint_Gaia_opseclog_VPN_and_Firewall_FW_and_NAT_rule": from 4th up to 100th within 5 minutes

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Aggregated event. {event_src.host}: {protocol} connection from {src.host}:{src.port} to {dst.host}:{dst.port} was denied. Reason: {reason}
